title: Wholesome Wilted Thai Garlic Bulb Khanom-Krok
description: A tangy, molten Thai dish featuring a fermented dough, garlic bulb, and fresh herbs. This energizing plant-based recipe is perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.
instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of coconut oil and swirl to coat.
Add the galangal and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chili flakes and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the garlic bulb and cook for 2 minutes, until softened.
Add the fish sauce, lime juice, and sugar. Stir to combine.
Add the Thai basil and stir to combine.
Add the long-fermentation-dough and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the dough starts to soften.
Use a spatula to shape the dough into a flat circle.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the bottom is crispy and the top is molten.
Flip the khanom-krok and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the other side is crispy and golden.
